description.unified: Deals M.DMG to [2->3] enemies and push them back, leaving a Judgment Sigil on them for 15 sec and increases M.DMG the targets take by [15%->25%] for 10 sec.

Deals M.DMG to frontal enemies in a straight line. Deals additional M.DMG that ignores DEF to targets with Judgment Sigil, and reduces their Heal Rate by [30%->50%] for [7 sec->10 sec]. [(removed) additional damage gains 500 extra DEF Penetration]

Deals M.DMG to the target and enemies in a nearby range, inflicting Silence for [2 sec->5 sec]. Enemies with Judgment Sigil take [40%->50%] increased M.DMG. Afterward, grants immunity to M.DMG to all allies for 5 sec.

Every 15 sec, deals M.DMG [ignoring DEF->(removed)] to enemies [with Judgment Mark->inflicted by Judgement Sigil]. Once during every battle, upon reaching [fatal damage->near death HP], deals M.DMG to enemies inflicted by Judgement Sigils and stuns them for [1.2 sec->3 sec], while casting a shield that blocks DMG to all allies for 5 sec. Gains immunity to CC while the shield is in effect. When the shield effect takes place, consumes all mana, and all skill cooldown is increased by 50%. [(removed) increases Status Resistance by 600]

light.unified: Recovers 500 Mana upon a Critical Hit. [(removed) Mana cost is reduced by 1000]

description.unified: [Celestial Arrow] Increases DMG by {0}% and the number of targets by [2->1].
[Purifying Blaze] Reduces Mana Cost by [1000->1] and increases DMG by {0}%.
[Arbiter] DMG is increased by {0}% and all allies' ATK is increased by [25%->30%] for the duration of M.Shield.
[The Last Judgment] Upon receiving fatal DMG, heals HP of all allies by 15% of Max HP, and silences entire enemies for {0} sec.
Every 10 sec, inflicts a Judgement Sigil on 1 random enemy for 15 sec, then deals M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK, Ignores DEF if the target is not a Hero. [(removed) DEF Penetration is increased by 500]
Summons the Soul of Clear Blue Sky, Sherrkyle, dealing M.DMG to all enemies and marking Judgment Sigil for 15 sec. Afterward, increases own Crit DMG by [72%->100%] for 11 sec.

1.from: For the duration, reduces cooldown of all own skills by 1 sec every 2 sec.
1.to: For the duration of Skill, reduces Cooldown of self's all Skills by 1 sec every sec.
1.unified: For the duration of Skill, reduces Cooldown of self's all Skills by 1 sec every [2 sec->1 sec].

2.from: For the duration, every 2 sec, attacks a random enemy, dealing 150% of ATK as M.DMG and applying [Judgment Sigil] for 15 sec. If the target already has [Judgment Sigil], removes it and deals an additional 300% of ATK as M.DMG. This additional DMG gains 500 increased DEF Penetration.
2.to: For the duration of Skill, attacks a random enemy, dealing ??? M.DMG every 1 sec and marking Judgment Sigil for 15 sec. If the target is already marked, deals additional ??? M.DMG that ignores DEF.
2.unified: For the duration of Skill, attacks a random enemy, dealing M.DMG every [2 sec->1 sec] and marking Judgment Sigil for 15 sec. If the target is already marked, deals additional M.DMG that ignores DEF. [(removed) additional DMG gains 500 increased DEF Penetration]
